issues.title: KPI labels use technical jargon
issues.description: Labels like 'Arrest Rate', 'Domestic %', and 'YoY Change' are not explained. A citizen doesn't know what 'domestic' means in this context or what 'YoY' stands for.
issues.expected: Labels like 'What % of crimes lead to arrest?' or 'Crimes involving family/household'

issues.title: No 'What am I looking at?' section
issues.description: First-time visitors have no explanation of what the dashboard shows, where the data comes from, or what time period it covers.
reproduction_steps: Navigate to Dashboard as a new user
Look for any introductory text or help section
issues.expected: A collapsible 'About this data' section explaining the dashboard purpose
issues.actual: No introductory text; page starts with KPI cards immediately

issues.title: Heatmap color legend is not intuitive
issues.description: The 'Crimes by Hour of Day' heatmap uses indigo shades but there is no label explaining what darker/lighter means. A citizen may not know that darker = more crimes.
issues.expected: Legend with labels: 'Lighter = fewer crimes, Darker = more crimes'
issues.actual: Color bar at bottom with no text explanation

issues.title: No data freshness indicator
issues.description: There is no indication of when the data was last updated. A citizen doesn't know if this is current or historical.
reproduction_steps: Look for 'Last updated' or 'Data as of' text
issues.expected: A footer or header showing data freshness (e.g., 'Data as of 2026-05-31')
issues.actual: No data freshness indicator anywhere on the page

summary: Dashboard shows real data but uses technical jargon, lacks explanations, and has no onboarding for first-time visitors.
